ceiling_note: Theoretical perfect run: 7 compass-type Rainbow cogwheels, SSS+clockwork_51, max Alice procs. P≈0; used as 100% reference only.

tier_ranges.S+: 942–1653 fe — best ceiling services, define the run
tier_ranges.S: 305–391 fe — strong picks, take if S+ not offered
tier_ranges.A: 127–219 fe — solid value, good when S/S+ unavailable
tier_ranges.B: 50–94 fe — interchangeable, pick whatever is offered
tier_ranges.C: 10–49 fe — low value, only if nothing better available

reroll_thresholds.note: First offer: keep if best option ≥ 106.83 fe (ID23 or better). Second offer: keep if best ≥ 86.17 fe (ID19/Dolls or better). Final offer: take best.

player_rule.first_offer: Keep ID23 or better. Otherwise reroll.
player_rule.second_offer: Keep ID19 / Dolls' Hunting Ground or better. Otherwise reroll.
player_rule.roulette_caveat: EV-max: keep Roulette. Stable farming: skip if variance is a problem.

cog_count_assumption.note: 5/6/7 cogs equally likely. Services selected before cog count revealed. EV uses expected 6.

warnings: Roulette is positive EV only under flat 10% fail model. See sensitivity_only entry for escalating model.
Chinese service pool may or may not include +60% Gold/Rainbow service-frequency nodes; used as-is by default.
ID19 and ID27 corrected in v1.2 from global 15% proc to 15% per completed cog.
Do not use v0.9/v1.0 ranking data — predates ID19/ID27 per-cog correction.

services.name: Nut Trick
notes: Assume 100% of possible same-rarity 3-cog combos made. Two triples possible if 6 same-rarity cogs exist.

services.name: Clockwork Ballet Heist
notes: 3 vouchers on last cog; each voucher 50/50 Orange or Red.

services.name: Clockwork Roulette
notes: Positive EV only under flat 10% fail model. If fail escalates this becomes negative.

services.name: Bloody Mary
notes: 3–5 Purple+ vouchers immediately. SS rating, 15s default, Mary chases after 3s.

services.name: All Tabs on Me
notes: Upgrades 1–2 existing cogs to Rainbow. Does not add extra cogs. 1 vs 2 upgrades split 50/50.

services.name: Best Doll Employee
notes: 20% chance per completed cog for extra voucher skewed toward higher rarity.

services.name: Triple Combo Bonus
notes: 3 completions in 30s → 2 Orange Vouchers. Condition effectively always passed for normal play — model as 100%.

services.name: Instant Voucher Cache
notes: 2–3 vouchers (up to Orange) immediately at start.

services.name: Cogwheel Gambler
notes: 40%/+1, 20%/+2, 5%/+3 vouchers per completion. 10% chance safe early end.

services.name: Runaway Dancer Hunt
notes: 15% chance per completed cog → Runaway Dancer → 1 Orange Voucher. EV uses expected 6 cogs pre-reveal.

services.name: Dolls' Hunting Ground
notes: Time doubled at start. 50% per completion → extra higher-rarity voucher. Death ends run early. Extra voucher pool diluted.

services.name: All-or-Nothing Rating
notes: 6 Cogwheels. Hit B → jumps to SSS rating.

services.name: Dual Rarity Boost
notes: +1 rarity for 2 randomly selected Cogwheels at start.

services.name: Lucky Upgrade + Time
notes: 30% per completed cog → that cog's voucher upgrades +1 rarity + 10s. Independent per-cog roll.

services.name: Lucky Upgrade
notes: 30% per completed cog → that cog's voucher upgrades +1 rarity. Independent per-cog roll.

services.name: Cogwheel Culling
notes: Remove 1–2 Cogwheels, remaining all +1 rarity. Paired-delta logic applied.

services.name: Rare Bonus Voucher
notes: 10% chance per completion → extra higher-rarity voucher.

services.name: Late-Game Bonus
notes: >20s remaining per cog → 15% chance extra voucher. EV uses expected 6 cogs pre-reveal.

services.name: Single Rarity Boost
notes: +1 rarity for 1 randomly selected Cogwheel at start.

services.name: Starter Voucher
notes: Immediately obtain 1 Blue Cogwheel Voucher at start.

services.name: Every-4th Bonus
notes: Every 4 completions → 1 extra Blue Voucher.

services.name: Time Extender
notes: 1 Time Extender in stage.

services.name: Rush Bonus
notes: <20s remaining → 30% extra voucher. Normal-play EV = 0; player does not intentionally slow cogs.

sensitivity_variants.name: Clockwork Roulette (escalating fail model)
notes: Under escalating fail model (10%→47% per cog), EV is negative. Optimal stop at cog 4.
